title: INP 2026: one tweak cut 67% of slow clicks
meta_description: Cut INP 67% in 2026 with scheduler.postTask, Comlink cache, and a CSS spinner — the real steps that worked on low-end devices in Kenya and Uganda.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams think INP is about faster servers.

It’s about respecting the 16 ms event-loop budget on a $40 Android Go phone.

https://kubaik.github.io/inp-2026-one-tweak-cut-67-of-slow-clicks
